meta.siteTitle: Andrew Loloy — Web Developer & Automation Engineer
meta.siteDescription: Andrew Loloy is a Manila-based web developer and automation engineer specializing in API integrations, n8n workflows, and B2B e-commerce platforms.

personal.name: Andrew Loloy
personal.title: Web Developer & Automation Engineer
personal.tagline: I build systems that work — and teams that ship.
personal.bio: I'm a web developer and automation engineer based in Manila, specializing in API-driven workflows, B2B e-commerce integrations, and building products that scale. Currently leading a dev team at Journey Better, shipping integrations across Zoho, Webflow, FoxyCart, and HubSpot for international clients.

experience.summary: Lead developer at a digital marketing agency serving international B2B e-commerce clients.
highlights: Lead and mentor 3 junior developers within a 6-person web development team
Reduced workflow execution time from ~30 minutes to under 10 minutes
Diagnosed and resolved webhook-driven server congestion through scheduling optimizations
Led integrations across Zoho CRM/Inventory, FoxyCart, Webflow, HubSpot, Plytix, and Typeform

experience.summary: Dating app focused on real-life connections.
highlights: Built a website plugin that expanded the app's reach to 400+ new users across 4 countries within one month
Maintained the application backend and collaborated with a cross-functional team

experience.summary: One of the top digital marketing companies in the Philippines.
highlights: Improved website design and UX by redesigning web components, optimizing images, and enhancing page layouts
Boosted website traffic through SEO implementation and streamlined internal sales tools
Enhanced clients' web design and UX; increased online visibility through SEO implementation
Developed Chatty, an AI-powered chatbot for employee knowledge management

projects.title: B2B E-Commerce Integration Suite
projects.description: End-to-end automation connecting Zoho, FoxyCart, and Webflow for a laboratory equipment supplier.

projects.title: Anyplans Growth Plugin
projects.description: Website plugin that expanded a dating app's reach to 400+ users across 4 countries in one month.

projects.title: Chatty — Internal AI Chatbot
projects.description: AI-powered knowledge management chatbot built for a digital marketing agency's internal teams.
